vivid/color/border/default.$description: A default border color used for standard borders, dividers, and strokes.

vivid/color/border/strong.$description: A strong border color used for high-emphasis borders, dividers, and strokes.

vivid/color/border/muted.$description: A muted border color used for low-emphasis borders, dividers, and strokes.

vivid/color/border/primary/strong.$description: A primary border color used to communicate brand presence and highlight key elements.

vivid/color/border/primary/muted.$description: A primary border color used to communicate brand presence and highlight key elements.

vivid/color/border/announcement/strong.$description: An accent border color used to highlight secondary branded elements or areas of visual emphasis.

vivid/color/border/announcement/muted.$description: A muted accent border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting accent elements.

vivid/color/border/info/strong.$description: An informational border color used to highlight info states, messages, or emphasis elements.

vivid/color/border/info/muted.$description: A muted informational border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting info elements.

vivid/color/border/danger/strong.$description: A danger border color used to highlight danger states, messages, or emphasis elements.

vivid/color/border/danger/muted.$description: A muted danger border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting danger elements.

vivid/color/border/warning/strong.$description: A warning border color used to highlight warning states, messages, or emphasis elements.

vivid/color/border/warning/muted.$description: A muted warning border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting warning elements.

vivid/color/border/success/strong.$description: A success border color used to highlight success states, messages, or emphasis elements.

vivid/color/border/success/muted.$description: A muted success border color used for subtle emphasis, decoration, or supporting success elements.

vivid/color/border/neutral/strong.$description: A strong neutral border color used for high-emphasis borders, dividers, and strokes.

vivid/color/border/neutral/muted.$description: A muted neutral border color used for low-emphasis borders, dividers
